## Public Engagement Research and Analysis Division
Public Engagement Research and Analysis Division Communication and Public Affairs Directorate Health Canada 200 Eglantine Driveway, 15th floor Address Locator: 1915C Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9
Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada) E-mail: cpab.consultations-dgcap@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Additional Information
